tactical_shape: Unchanged side from the previous match, with more thrust and bite after a triple substitution at the hour
Pushed more players forward in the second half and took more risks to force the win
standout_players: Deniz Undav scored twice, including the 94th-minute winner
Yahia Fofana made a majestic save to deny Havertz
Kai Havertz had early attempts and had a goal ruled out after Musiala's foul
Joshua Kimmich provided the cross for Havertz's header
Nadiem Amiri was influential off the bench and set up Undav's equaliser
Lennart Karl was absent through injury
Serge Gnabry was absent through injury
Manuel Neuer returned from international retirement to solve the goalkeeper issue
Jamal Musiala was involved in attack but also committed the foul for the disallowed goal
fatigue_injuries: Injuries to Serge Gnabry and Lennart Karl were noted before the tournament
Manuel Neuer had been coaxed back from almost two years of international retirement
Germany have concerns over the form of Musiala and Wirtz
home_read.momentum: A dramatic late win sends Germany into the knockout stages for the first time in 12 years and reinforces their reputation as tournament specialists.

tactical_shape: Sat in tightly packed lines and invited pressure before breaking quickly
Lured Germany forward, then tried to hurt them on the break
No longer looked so fit or frightful in the press late on
standout_players: Franck Kessié opened the scoring with the 30th-minute goal
Yan Diomande repeatedly carried the threat down the left
Amad Diallo had the chance after Diomande's cross but was blocked
Yahia Fofana made several important saves for Côte d'Ivoire
Simon Adingra was criticised for dawdling on a late breakaway
away_read.momentum: Despite the defeat, Côte d'Ivoire are praised for pushing a major favourite hard and carry pride, with the result framed as a learning experience that can help them later in the tournament.
